chart_type: 3-color scatter + 3 dashed/solid fit lines in same colors
method: §2 scatter + aspect-ratio dashed-fragment filter (>2.5) + solid-line density+area filter (density<0.25 ∧ area>200 → line) + k-means split only when CC is square-ish and dense.
known_undercount: Blue markers that sit on the dashed blue fit line classify as dash fragments.
